arts.ttl: Watch the magic moment Ed Sheeran celebrates incredible Ipswich goal as plucky Premier League underdogs look to rain on Ruben Amorim's parade in his first game as Man United boss
arts.sum: Hutchinson is becoming a bit of a long-range specialist as his last six strikes have all come from outside the penalty area. His latest goal certainly got the seal of approval from Sheeran on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Ipswich vs Man United: VAR stopped by fire alarm
arts.sum: VAR was temporarily suspended during Manchester United's clash at Ipswich Town in the Premier League on Sunday after a fire alarm sounded at its Stockley Park control centre.

arts.ttl: VAR stops working during Ipswich vs Manchester United Premier League game: what happens next?
arts.sum: Why did VAR stop working during Ipswich vs Manchester United? Sunday’s Premier League game between Ipswich Town and Manchester United was notable for being Ruben Amorim’s first game in charge of the Red Devils, but also for VAR being unavailable for a short period of time in the first half.

arts.ttl: Fire alarm at Stockley Park causes VAR outage during Manchester United match
arts.sum: Ipswich equalised during the five-minute spell at Portman Road where the VAR system was down

arts.ttl: VAR switched OFF during Ipswich vs Man Utd as fire alarm causes chaos
arts.sum: Referee Anthony Taylor called together captains Sam Morsy and Bruno Fernandes shortly before the end of the first half to inform them that technology could not be used

arts.ttl: Why Leicester chose to sack Steve Cooper and the ex-Man Utd manager who might replace him
arts.sum: TOM COLLOMOSSE: There is fault on both sides. Though keen to return to the dugout after six months away from the game, Cooper was giving himself no margin of error by moving to Leicester.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford Scores First Goal of Ruben Amorim Era Inside 80 Seconds
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford fired Manchester United in front of Ipswich Town in Ruben Amorim's debut.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim’s first game for Man United: Does the ‘new manager bounce’ actually exist?
arts.sum: 11 of the 14 changes also had a better points-per-game ratio than their predecessors, showing that often a change in manager will improve the team over a long-term period as well as giving an initial lift. To watch the Premier League match between Ipswich Town and Manchester United tune in at 11:30 a.m. ET, fans in the United States have several options for both live television and streaming.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford scores 80 seconds into Ruben Amorim's first Man Utd game
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford, starting up for Manchester United, gave Ruben Amorim a dream start to his tenure as head coach.

arts.ttl: Follow LIVE: Ruben Amorim takes charge of first Man United game
arts.sum: New Manchester United manager Ruben Amorim takes charge after replacing Erik ten Hag, as they visit Ipswich Town in the Premier League.
